query: SELECT id, clientId, title, filename, driveFileId, s3Key, url, mimeType FROM partnerDocuments WHERE filename LIKE '%RRAL%' OR filename LIKE '%procedure%' OR title LIKE '%RRAL%' OR title LIKE '%procedure%' OR filename LIKE '%.xlsx%' OR filename LIKE '%.xls%' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT id, clientId, title, filename, driveFileId, s3Key, url, mimeType FROM partnerDocuments WHERE filename LIKE '%RRAL%' OR filename LIKE '%procedure%' OR title LIKE '%RRAL%' OR title LIKE '%procedure%' OR filename LIKE '%.xlsx%' OR filename LIKE '%.xls%' LIMIT 10;
